response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and identified the background music as "Prisoner" by Hololive English -Advent-. I used the search tool to confirm the song title and artist. I divided the video into a non-musical intro (00:00-00:10), the main slideshow accompanied by the song "Prisoner" (00:10-04:47), and a final non-musical promo segment (04:47-04:59). I then formatted this into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional slideshow for the "hololive English -Advent- 2nd Anniversary Live: On the Run!" event, featuring fan messages and merchandise information, set to the background track "Prisoner" by Hololive English -Advent-.

scenes.description: Introductory title cards and Ollie's Zom-Raid Time message.
Slideshow of fan messages and merchandise, featuring the song "Prisoner" playing as background music.
